Load Selected Outputs from a ksTFL Meta Folder or .ks File

Source: R/import.R
ks_load.Rd

Loads only the requested output ids into a ks_study object.

Usage

ks_load(
  path,
  ids = NULL,
  latest_only = TRUE,
  max_rows = ks_get_option("max_rows")
)

Arguments

path

Character scalar. ksTFL meta folder or .ks file.

ids

Optional character vector of output ids to load. If NULL, all available outputs are loaded.

latest_only

Logical. When reading a meta folder, keep only reports marked as latest if the index carries is_latest.

max_rows

Integer. Maximum table rows embedded per context.

Value

A ks_study object containing only the selected outputs.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
study <- ks_load("path/to/outputs/meta", ids = c("14-3.01", "14-3.02"))
} # }
